title: ResultPacket
description: Specialist-to-Director return packet. Validated on every sub-agent return. Schema version 2: adds caveats_embedded as ConcernEntry array (P-VS-08), severity_grade enum, clearness_queries (P-VS-07 phase 1 output), and cross-field invariants enforcing Quaker pipeline contracts. Backward-compatible via schemas/migrations/v1_to_v2.py.

allOf.description: P-VS-06 cross-field invariant: threshing_pass role MUST produce SCOPE_STOP verdict.
P-VS-07 phase 1 cross-field invariant: clearness_phase1 role MUST produce SCOPE_STOP verdict and populate clearness_queries.
P-VS-08 cross-field invariant: APPROVE_WITH_CAVEATS verdict MUST have ≥1 ConcernEntry with severity_grade.

model_used.description: Which provider/model actually served the call.

caveats_embedded.description: P-VS-08 stand-aside concerns. Required when verdict=APPROVE_WITH_CAVEATS. Each entry has whisper/voice/weight severity per Sheeran 1983 §5.3. Concerns flow forward to next dispatch's caveats_embedded post-cacheable-prefix.

clearness_queries.description: P-VS-07 phase 1 output. Required when role=clearness_phase1; minItems=1. Each query MUST have is_leading=false (auto-J classifier check targets ≥95% rate).

severity_grade.description: P-VS-08 verdict-level severity grade for stand-aside. Per Sheeran 1983 §5.3. Optional but conventionally populated alongside APPROVE_WITH_CAVEATS for verdict-level summary; per-concern severity lives in caveats_embedded[].severity_grade.

judge_provider.description: P-VS-02 + P-VS-10: provider/model that served the judge dispatch when this is a cross-family verdict. Used for position-bias mitigation logging.

position_swap_delta.description: P-VS-10 position-bias mitigation: verdict-quality delta between position-swapped dispatches (0 = identical verdicts after swap; >0.15 routes to seasoning).
